case_title: MIDLAND FUNDING LLC ASSIGNEE OF BANK OF AMERICA VS. ZENAIDA B LAPIDARIO et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC ASSIGNEE OF BANK OF AMERICA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LAPIDARIO, ZENAIDA B $8,053.73 PRINCIPAL, $248.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $8,301.73, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC ASSIGNEE OF BANK OF AMERICA AS TO DEFENDANT LAPIDARIO, ZENAIDA B DOES 1 TO 100, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUN-29-2009
DECLARATION OF ERICA L. BRACHFELD RE: WAIVER OF ATTYS'. FEES FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC ASSIGNEE OF BANK OF AMERICA
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC ASSIGNEE OF BANK OF AMERICA

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC ASSIGNEE OF BANK OF AMERICA SERVED FEB-11-2009, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT LAPIDARIO, ZENAIDA B
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $248.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT LAPIDARIO, ZENAIDA B
